untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'box pattern' consolidation and 'yearly high/low position' context, which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators. Yearly price range position tracking and box pattern identification require custom pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set. Used Donchian breakout as proxy for box breakout, but this loses the pattern-specific nuance and yearly positioning context mentioned in source material.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'Breakout Box pattern' as breakout from consolidation (approximated with Donchian channels). The critical context about yearly price position and market trend alignment cannot be fully captured. The 43% throwback/pullback parameter is noted but not integrated into entry/exit logic as it typically describes post-breakout behavior rather than entry timing. ADX>25 used as trend confirmation. Stop loss set to 5% as conservative default given lack of author guidance. Hold days set to 60 days (~3 weeks to 5 weeks mentioned) as upper bound.
